testcase.name: insertUser_test

error.message:
### Error updating database. Cause: java.sql.SQLIntegrityConstraintViolationException: ORA-00001: 무결성 제약 조건(EDU.SYS_C008380)에 위배됩니다
https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00001/ ### The error may exist in sql/Member_Statement.xml ### The error may involve com.min.edu.model.MemberDaoImpl.insertUser-Inline ### The error occurred while setting parameters ### SQL: INSERT INTO MEMBER(ID, NAME, PASSWORD, EMAIL, AUTH, ENABLE, JOINDATE) VALUES(?, ?, ?, ?, 'ROLE_USER', 'Y' , CURRENT_DATE) ### Cause: java.sql.SQLIntegrityConstraintViolationException: ORA-00001: 무결성 제약 조건(EDU.SYS_C008380)에 위배됩니다
https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00001/

testcase.error:
org.apache.ibatis.exceptions.PersistenceException:
### Error updating database. Cause: java.sql.SQLIntegrityConstraintViolationException: ORA-00001: 무결성 제약 조건(EDU.SYS_C008380)에 위배됩니다
https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00001/ ### The error may exist in sql/Member_Statement.xml ### The error may involve com.min.edu.model.MemberDaoImpl.insertUser-Inline ### The error occurred while setting parameters ### SQL: INSERT INTO MEMBER(ID, NAME, PASSWORD, EMAIL, AUTH, ENABLE, JOINDATE) VALUES(?, ?, ?, ?, 'ROLE_USER', 'Y' , CURRENT_DATE) ### Cause: java.sql.SQLIntegrityConstraintViolationException: ORA-00001: 무결성 제약 조건(EDU.SYS_C008380)에 위배됩니다
